template:
**DOCUMENT FORMAT — REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS**:
Formal request for documents and tangible things under rules of civil procedure.

STRUCTURE:
1. COURT CAPTION: Court, parties, case number
2. TITLE: "[PLAINTIFF'S/DEFENDANT'S] FIRST REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS"
3. INSTRUCTIONS AND DEFINITIONS:
   - Define "document" broadly (papers, electronic records, photos, videos, etc.)
   - Reference applicable rules (Mass. R. Civ. P. 34 or federal equivalent)
   - Production format (native electronic, paper copies)
4. REQUESTS: Numbered requests covering:
   - Communications between parties
   - Contracts and agreements
   - Financial records
   - Insurance policies
   - Medical records (if applicable)
   - Photographs and videos
   - Electronic communications (email, text)
   - Expert reports
5. SIGNATURE BLOCK

FORMAT: Number each request. Define time period covered. Be specific about categories.
hints: Key elements to address: categories of documents, time period, relevant custodians, format specifications.
